title: The Bird Feeder
summary: A child visits their grandmother, who has watched and fed the same garden birds for many years.

title: Lost at the Airport
summary: A traveller asks an airport officer for help after leaving her bag on the bus.

title: The Old Bookshop
summary: A tourist visits a quiet bookshop in Paris and meets the owner.

title: Waiting for the Train
summary: A man waits for his train early in the morning in a quiet station.

title: The Clockmaker's Shop
summary: A portrait of Harold, a clockmaker who has repaired antique clocks in the same small English town shop for over thirty years.

title: The Community Garden
summary: Ben, a new resident, meets his neighbour Rosa at a building garden meeting and learns the rules and routines of their shared vegetable plot.

title: Morning at the Harbour
summary: Mei runs a fish stall at an early morning harbour market, continuing a family trade passed down through three generations.

title: A Sunday at the Street Market
summary: A narrator visits a lively Sunday street market in a small English town and describes the colourful stalls, wonderful smells, and friendly people she meets along the way.

title: Planning a Picnic
summary: Two friends, Maya and Jake, chat about planning a picnic in the park — they discuss what food to bring, which park to choose, and what time to meet.

title: Grandma's Photo Album
summary: A narrator discovers an old photo album at her grandmother's house and describes the faded photographs and the warm memories they bring back to life.

title: At the Train Station
summary: A traveller named Tom asks a station employee, Anna, about trains to Edinburgh — including departure times, the platform, and the ticket price.

title: A Weekend Under the Stars
summary: A narrator describes a camping weekend with friends — the fun of setting up the tent, cooking a simple meal outdoors, and drifting off to sleep beneath the open sky.

title: New Neighbours
summary: Maria and Dan meet for the first time in their apartment building. Dan has just moved in, and the two neighbours introduce themselves and share small details about their lives.

title: My First Time Cooking Curry
summary: A narrator tries to cook a Thai green curry for the first time, following a recipe step by step. Not everything goes to plan, but the final dish turns out surprisingly well.

title: What to Buy for Amy's Birthday
summary: Sam and Chloe debate what to buy as a birthday gift for their mutual friend Amy who is turning thirty. They weigh up several ideas before landing on the perfect choice.

title: Watching the Stars
summary: A narrator lies on the grass in his backyard on a clear night and describes the experience of stargazing — what he sees, what he thinks about, and how the night sky makes him feel.

title: Booking a Doctor's Appointment
summary: A patient calls a doctor's clinic to book an appointment. The receptionist asks about her symptoms and availability and finds a suitable time for her to come in.
